name: PM Vibe Agent Run
persona: A PM at a 30–200 person SaaS company who needs to convert scattered daily notes into a crisp, audience-ready status update before standup or leadership syncs
problem_statement: When a PM needs to post an update fast, messy notes turn into vague or overloaded summaries that hide decisions, miss asks, and recreate alignment churn
artifact_type: single-page web app that converts pasted daily notes into a structured run snapshot with copy-ready outputs
